allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); regs=d.get\('data',{}\).get\('registrations',{}\).get\('results',[]\); print\(f'Count: {len\(regs\)}'\); [print\(f'  {r[\\"id\\"]}: {r[\\"name\\"]}'\) for r in regs[:10]]")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/graphql -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"query\\":\\"{__type\(name:\\\\\\"Registration\\\\\\"\){name fields{name type{name kind ofType{name kind}}}}}\\"}")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/graphql -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"query\\":\\"{__type\(name:\\\\\\"Profile\\\\\\"\){name fields{name type{name kind ofType{name kind}}}}}\\"}")
